Air.name: Gust
Air.description: You unleash a violent cone of air. All creatures in a 30 ft cone must make a Strength save. On a failure they are pushed to the end of the cone. If forced into a creature or object, all involved creatures take 1d4 Magical Bludgeoning damage. If a creature is moved more than 10 ft by this spell, it must make a Constitution save or gain Suffocating for 1 turn.

Air.name: Silence
Air.description: Concentration. Create a 20 ft sphere at a point you can see within range. No sound passes into, out of, or through the sphere. Creatures inside are Silenced (Mute) and gain Immunity to Thunder damage while they remain inside it. The sphere is stationary but may be dismissed by you at any time.

Air.name: Haste
Air.description: Touch a creature. It gains the Hasted condition for 3 turns. When Haste ends, that creature gains Lethargic as normal.

Air.name: Gale Lance
Air.description: Choose a 5 ft wide, 60 ft long line you can see. Creatures in the line must make a Strength save. On a failure they take 2d6 Air damage, are pushed 20 ft in the line’s direction, and if they collide with a creature or object all involved creatures take 1d6 Magical Bludgeoning damage. If moved more than 10 ft, they must make a Constitution save or gain Suffocating for 1 turn.

Air.name: Cyclone
Air.description: Choose a point you can see. A spiraling column of wind erupts in a 20 ft radius. Creatures in the area must make a Strength save. On a failure they take 3d6 Air damage, are pushed 15 ft away from the center, and gain Suffocating for 1 turn. On a success they take half damage and are not moved.

Air.name: Tempest Prison
Air.description: Choose a point you can see. A roaring storm cylinder forms in a 25 ft radius and lasts for 3 turns. Creatures inside when it appears must make a Strength save or take 4d6 Air damage, be unable to take flight, and be pushed to the outer edge of the area. A creature that starts its turn inside must repeat the save or take 2d6 Air damage and gain Suffocating for 1 turn. This spell requires Concentration.

Air.name: Sky Rend
Air.description: You tear the battlefield open with a colossal front of compressed wind in a 40 ft cone. Creatures in the cone must make a Strength save. On a failure they take 6d6 Air damage, are thrown to the cone’s end, and if they strike a creature or object all involved creatures take 2d6 Magical Bludgeoning damage. Creatures moved more than 10 ft must make a Constitution save or gain Suffocating for 2 turns. On a success they take half damage and are pushed only 10 ft gaining Suffocating for 1 turn.
Air.upcast_rule: x2, +2d6 damage and +10 ft cone length

Ash.name: Ash Cloud
Ash.description: Create a hot ash cloud. Creatures inside at the end of their turn take 3d6 Ash damage and gain Blinded x1 and Deafened x1. Concentration.

Ash.name: Soot Mark
Ash.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 5d8 Ash damage and the target becomes Blinded x2 and Deafened x1 as ash cakes its face and ears. Until cleaned or the effect ends, it leaves visible trails when it moves.

Ash.name: Funeral Drift
Ash.description: Sweep a burning drift of ash across the field. Creatures in the line must make a Dex save. On fail, take 6d8 Ash damage, gain Blinded x2 and Deafened x2. On success, take half and gain Blinded x1.

Ash.name: Cinder Shroud
Ash.description: Cloak yourself in drifting ash for 3 turns. You become Lightly Obscured, ranged attacks against you suffer -2 Accuracy, and creatures that target you with sight-based attacks must first pass a Wisdom save or attack with Disadvantage. Adjacent enemies at end of turn take 4d6 Ash damage and gain Blinded x1. Concentration.

Ash.name: Black Sky
Ash.description: Fill the area with choking black ash. Creatures in the zone must make a Constitution save. On fail, take 8d8 Ash damage, gain Blinded x3 and Deafened x3, and the area becomes heavily obscured for 3 turns. On success, take half and gain Blinded x1.

Atomic.name: Nuclear Strike
Atomic.description: Make a melee spell attack against a creature within reach. On a hit, an atomic explosion erupts centered on the target, affecting all creatures within 5 feet of it. Each affected creature must make a DEX save, taking 40 + 5d6 Atomic damage on a failure, or half as much on a success. The target of this attack automatically fails the save and takes an additional 10 Atomic damage. All creatures affected by the explosion gain 1 stack of Radiation. The target gains 3 stacks of Radiation instead.

Atomic.name: Go Atomic
Atomic.description: This spell costs an additional Bonus Action to cast. Explode into a massive atomic detonation centered on yourself. All creatures in 200 ft including you take 150 Atomic damage and gain Radiation x15. You take half damage from the explosion.

Atomic.name: Critical Atomicity
Atomic.description: This spell costs an additional Bonus Action to cast. Choose a point you can see instead of centering it on yourself. Creatures in a 200 ft radius take 200 Atomic damage and gain Radiation x18. Structures, terrain, and mundane matter in the zone are devastated at GM discretion. You take half damage from the explosion.

Atomic.name: Fallout Crown
Atomic.description: This spell costs an additional Bonus Action to cast. Choose a point. The initial blast deals 300 Atomic damage in a 220 ft radius and applies Radiation x20. The zone then remains irradiated for 3 turns; creatures entering or ending their turn there gain Radiation x3 and take 4d12 Atomic damage. You take half damage from the explosion.

Atomic.name: Fission Verdict
Atomic.description: This spell costs an additional Bonus Action to cast. Choose up to 3 points you can see within range. At each point, a small detonation erupts in a 120 ft radius, each dealing 150 Atomic damage and Radiation x12. Any creature caught in more than one radius takes all damage and stacks all Radiation. You take half damage from the explosion.

Atomic.name: Last Sun
Atomic.description: This spell costs an additional Bonus Action to cast. Create an absolute end-state blast at a point you can see. Creatures in a 300 ft radius take 550 Atomic damage and gain Radiation x35. The ground remains terminally irradiated for 5 turns, applying Radiation x30 and 8d20 Atomic damage to creatures entering or ending their turn there. You take half damage from the explosion.
Atomic.upcast_rule: x3, +550 flat damage, +50 ft radius, +10 Radiation stacks

Blight.name: Wither
Blight.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 2d8 Blight damage and apply Withered x1. Non-magical plants die instantly; magical plants take double damage.

Blight.name: Withering Grasp
Blight.description: Make a melee spell attack. On hit, deal 4d8 Blight damage and apply Withered x1. Plant creatures take double damage.

Blight.name: Rotsap
Blight.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 3d8 Blight damage, apply Withered x2, and the target loses 2 Vitality at the start of its next turn for each stack of Withered it has.

Blight.name: Hollow Season
Blight.description: Choose a creature you can see. It must make a Constitution save. On fail, take 4d8 Blight damage, gain Withered x3, and all healing received is reduced by half for 2 turns. On success, take half and gain Withered x1.

Blight.name: Dead Orchard
Blight.description: Choose a point. Dead growth erupts through the ground. Creatures in the area must make a Constitution save. On fail, take 5d8 Blight damage, gain Withered x3, and have Disadvantage on Strength and Dexterity checks for 2 turns as their bodies dry and stiffen.

Blight.name: Final Season
Blight.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 1408 Blight damage, apply Withered x4, and until the end of its next two turns the target cannot regain Vitality by any means. If it is a plant creature, it instead takes double damage and is Restrained by its own dead growth.

Bloodfire.name: Blood Boil
Bloodfire.description: Choose a creature with the Bleeding condition that you can see within range. The target must make a Constitution save. On a failure, it takes 4d8 Bloodfire damage per stack of Bleeding it currently has, and then gains 1 additional stack of Bleeding before the damage is finalized. You heal Health equal to one-third of the total Bloodfire damage dealt, rounded down, and the target gains Burned for 2 turns. On a success, the target takes half damage, still gains 1 stack of Bleeding, and you heal for one-sixth of the damage dealt to vitality. If there are no targets with Bleeding in range you may apply bleeding to yourself (taking 1d4 true damage) and then do the effect of this spell.

Bloodfire.name: Bloodletting
Bloodfire.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 2d6 Bloodfire damage and apply Bleeding. If the target was already Bleeding, deal +3d6 Bloodfire damage instead.

Bloodfire.name: Leech
Bloodfire.description: Choose a creature. It takes 2d8 Bloodfire damage at the start of each of its turns for 3 turns. You regain Health equal to the damage. This spell cannot reduce the target below 1 HP.

Bloodfire.name: Crimson Eruption
Bloodfire.description: Choose a bleeding creature you can see. The target violently erupts with burning blood, splashing everything nearby. The primary target must make a Constitution save. On a failure, it takes 6d8 Bloodfire damage per Bleeding stack, gains 2 additional Bleeding stacks, and gains On Fire. All other creatures within 15 ft must make a Dexterity save or take 8d8 Bloodfire damage and gain Burned for 2 turns. You heal Health equal to one-quarter of all Bloodfire damage dealt by this spell to vitality.

Bloodfire.name: Hemorrhage Inferno
Bloodfire.description: Choose a creature you can see within range. The target must make a Constitution save. On a failure, it takes 10d8 Bloodfire damage per Bleeding stack, gains 3 additional Bleeding stacks, gains On Fire, and has its healing reduced to 0 (cannot be healed by any means, only for health) for 2 turns as its blood is consumed by magical flame. On a success, it takes half damage, gains 1 stack of Bleeding, and gains Burned. After resolving the spell, you heal Health equal to one-half of the total Bloodfire damage dealt to the primary target.

Bloodfire.name: Bloodstorm Pyre
Bloodfire.description: Choose a point you can see within range. All creatures in a 20 ft radius must make a Constitution save. On a failure, a creature takes 15d8 Bloodfire damage, gains 2 stacks of Bleeding, gains On Fire, and if it was already Bleeding it instead gains 4 additional Bleeding stacks total and takes +8d8 Bloodfire damage. On a success, it takes half damage and gains Burned for 2 turns. For each creature damaged by this spell, you regain Health equal to one-fifth of the damage you dealt to that creature.

Bloodfire.name: Red Cataclysm
Bloodfire.description: Choose a point you can see within range. The battlefield erupts into a catastrophic rain of ignited blood and internal combustion. All creatures in a 30 ft radius must make a Constitution save. On a failure, a creature takes 20d8 Bloodfire damage, gains 4 stacks of Bleeding, gains On Fire, and if it was already Bleeding before the spell was cast it instead takes an additional 10d8 Bloodfire damage and gains 2 more stacks of Bleeding. On a success, the creature takes half damage, gains 2 stacks of Bleeding, and gains Burned for 3 turns. After the spell resolves, you heal Health equal to one-third of the total Bloodfire damage dealt by the spell, and any excess healing becomes Vitality.
Bloodfire.upcast_rule: x2, +12d8 base damage and +6d8 bonus-to-bleeding-targets damage

Chaos.name: Chaos Bolt
Chaos.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 1d8 Chaos damage and roll 1d6. Apply the corresponding effect to the target, Subsequent hits stack durations and condition stacks where applicable. **1:** Gain On Fire for 3 turns. **2:** Gain 1 stack of Frozen. **3:** Gain Slowed for 2 turns. **4:** Gain Hasted for 2 turns. **5:** Heal 1d6 Vitality. **6:** Gain Shocked for 3 turns.

Chaos.name: Chaotic Exchange
Chaos.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 2d8 Chaos damage and roll 2d8. Apply both effects to the target. Duplicate results stack durations, damage, and condition stacks where applicable. **1:** On Fire for 3 turns. **2:** Gain 2 Frozen stacks. **3:** Slowed for 2 turns. **4:** Hasted for 2 turns. **5:** Heal 2d6 Vitality. **6:** Shocked for 3 turns. **7:** Bleeding for 3 turns. **8:** Demoralized for 2 turns.

Chaos.name: Wild Sequence
Chaos.description: Choose up to 3 creatures you can see and make a separate spell attack against each. On hit, deal 3d8 Chaos damage and roll 3d10. Apply all rolled effects to each creature. Duplicate results stack. **1:** On Fire for 3 turns. **2:** Gain 3 Frozen stacks. **3:** Slowed for 3 turns. **4:** Hasted for 3 turns. **5:** Heal 3d6 Vitality. **6:** Shocked for 3 turns. **7:** Bleeding for 4 turns. **8:** Demoralized for 3 turns. **9:** Entangled. **10:** Soaked for 5 turns.

Chaos.name: Unwritten Turn
Chaos.description: Choose a creature you can see. It takes 4d8 Chaos damage and roll 4d12. Apply all rolled effects to each creature. Duplicate results stack. **1:** On Fire for 5 turns. **2:** Gain 5 Frozen stacks. **3:** Slowed for 3 turns. **4:** Hasted for 3 turns. **5:** Heal 4d8 Vitality. **6:** Shocked for 5 turns. **7:** Bleeding for 5 turns. **8:** Demoralized for 3 turns. **9:** Entangled. **10:** Soaked for 10 turns. **11:** Frightened for 2 turns. **12:** Roll twice more ignoring further results of 12.

Chaos.name: Disorder Engine
Chaos.description: Concentration, up to 3 turns. Create a 20 ft radius sphere of unstable reality. Creatures entering the area for the first time on a turn or starting their turn there take 5d8 Chaos damage and roll 2d20. Apply both effects. Duplicate results stack where possible. **1:** On Fire for 5 turns. **2:** Gain 5 Frozen stacks. **3:** Slowed for 5 turns. **4:** Hasted for 5 turns. **5:** Heal 5d8 Vitality. **6:** Shocked for 5 turns. **7:** Bleeding for 5 turns. **8:** Demoralized for 5 turns. **9:** Entangled. **10:** Soaked for 10 turns. **11:** Frightened for 3 turns. **12:** Gain Hurting equal to 1d4 stacks. **13:** Diseased for 5 turns. **14:** Charmed for 2 turns. **15:** Deafened for 3 turns. **16:** Blinded for 3 turns. **17:** Gain Cursed for 3 turns. **18:** Gain Hexed for 3 turns. **19:** Gain Psychic Drain for 1 turn. **20:** Gain Plagued for 3 turns.
Chaos.upcast_rule: x2, +2d8 zone damage and +1 turn duration

Corruption.name: Bestow Curse
Corruption.description: Touch a creature. It becomes Cursed.

Corruption.name: Black Tentacles
Corruption.description: Tentacles of dark energy erupt for 3 turns. Creatures in the area must make a Str save. On fail, they take 4d8 Corruption damage and become Restrained. While Restrained this way, they take 4d8 Corruption damage at the start of each of your turns. Escape DC = your Spell Save DC. This spell requires Concentration.

Corruption.name: Abyssal Chains
Corruption.description: Shadowy chains erupt from the ground beneath a creature you can see within range. The target must make a Strength save. On a failure, it takes 6d8 + 20 Corruption damage, becomes Entangled, gains 1 stack of Corrupt, and is also Mute while restrained this way. On a success, it takes half damage and is not Entangled or Muted. If the target is already suffering from Corrupt, increase the damage by +3d8 + 10 and reduce its Ap, BAp, and Rp by 1 until the end of its next turn.

Corruption.name: Black Binding
Corruption.description: Choose a creature you can see within range. Black restraints and cursed weight crush downward on the target. It must make a Strength save. On a failure, it takes 12d8 + 40 Corruption damage, becomes Entangled, gains 2 stacks of Corrupt, becomes Mute, and gains Slowed for 2 turns. On a success, it takes half damage and gains 1 stack of Corrupt. A creature already affected by Corrupt must also make a Wisdom save or become Cursed for 2 turns.

Corruption.name: Corrupt Dominion
Corruption.description: Choose a point you can see within range. A field of corruptive force blossoms in a 20 ft radius. All creatures in the area must make a Strength save. On a failure, a creature takes 16d8 + 60 Corruption damage, gains 2 stacks of Corrupt, becomes Mute, and is Entangled until it escapes normally. On a success, the creature takes half damage and gains 1 stack of Corrupt. Creatures already affected by Corrupt also gain Slow Death on a failed save.

Corruption.name: Fallen Throne
Corruption.description: Choose a point you can see within range. Corruption floods the battlefield like a kingdom collapsing into rot. All creatures in a 25 ft radius must make a Strength save. On a failure, a creature takes 20d8 + 80 Corruption damage, gains 3 stacks of Corrupt, becomes Mute, becomes Entangled, and gains Slow Death (2 stacks). On a success, the creature takes half damage and gains 1 stack of Corrupt. Any creature already affected by Corrupt automatically fails the Mute and Corrupt portions of the spell even on a successful save.

Corruption.name: Ruin of the Soul
Corruption.description: Choose a point you can see within range. The area is consumed by overwhelming corruption that tears apart body, will, and magic. All creatures in a 30 ft radius must make a Strength save. On a failure, a creature takes 24d8 + 120 Corruption damage, gains 4 stacks of Corrupt, becomes Mute, becomes Entangled, gains Slowed for 3 turns, and gains Slow Death (4 stacks). On a success, the creature takes half damage, gains 2 stacks of Corrupt, and becomes Mute for 1 turn. Any creature that was already suffering from Corrupt before this spell was cast instead takes an additional 10d8 + 60 Corruption damage and automatically gains the full Slow Death effect on a failed save.
Corruption.upcast_rule: x2, +12d8 damage and +1 Slow Death stack

Dust.name: Dust Storm
Dust.description: A swirling field of cutting dust surrounds you. Ranged attacks against you have Disadvantage. Enemies inside take 2d4 Dust damage at end of turn and gain Blinded for 1 turn. Concentration.

Dust.name: Sand Veil
Dust.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 5d6 Dust damage and the target becomes Blinded for 2 turns and gains Suffocating for 1 turn as dust fills the mouth and lungs.

Dust.name: Abrasion Line
Dust.description: Sweep a cutting line of dust across the field. Make one spell attack against each creature in the line. On hit, a target takes 6d6 Dust damage, becomes Blinded for 1 turn, and gains Suffocating for 1 turn.

Dust.name: Dune Mantle
Dust.description: Surround yourself in a thick orbit of dust for 3 turns. You gain half-cover, ranged attacks against you have Disadvantage, and any creature that hits you in melee or starts its turn adjacent to you takes 4d6 Dust damage and must make a Con save or gain Suffocating for 1 turn. Concentration.

Dust.name: Burial Wind
Dust.description: Unleash a suffocating wall of dust. Creatures in the cone must make a Con save. On fail, take 8d8 Dust damage, gain Blinded for 2 turns, and gain Suffocating for 2 turns. On success, take half damage and gain Suffocating for 1 turn.

Earth.name: Stoneskin
Earth.description: Touch a creature. It gains Resistance to Physical Damage for 3 turns.

Earth.name: Quake
Earth.description: All creatures other than you within 20 ft must make a Strength save. On a failure they take 1d6 Earth damage and are Prone. On a success they take no damage and are not knocked prone.

Earth.name: Slow
Earth.description: Choose a creature you can see within range. It must make a Wisdom save or gain the Slowed condition for 3 turns.

Earth.name: Stonewave
Earth.description: The ground rises and rolls outward from you. All creatures other than you within 30 ft must make a Strength save. On a failure they take 2d6 Earth damage, are Prone, and the area in the spell’s radius becomes Difficult Terrain until the end of your next turn. On a success they take half damage and are not knocked prone.

Earth.name: Earthshatter
Earth.description: Choose a point on the ground you can see. Jagged stone erupts in a 20 ft radius. Creatures in the area must make a Strength save. On a failure they take 4d6 Earth damage, are Prone, and become Slowed for 2 turns. On a success they take half damage and are not Slowed or knocked prone.

Earth.name: Bastion Rise
Earth.description: Choose up to four 5 ft squares of ground you can see within range. Thick stone pillars rise 25 ft there and remain for 3 turns. If a creature was on the space you formed a pillar they must make a Strength save or take 3d6 Earth damage and become Prone. If a creature succeed the roll they may make an acrobatics check (DC 12) to stay on the top of the Pillar. The pillars create solid cover and block normal movement until destroyed or the spell ends.

Earth.name: Worldbreak
Earth.description: The land violently collapses and rebounds around you in a 50 ft radius. All other creatures in range must make a Strength save. On a failure they take 8d6 Earth damage, are Prone, and are Stunned for 2 turns. On a success they take half damage and are only Prone. Structures in the area take double damage.

Earth.name: Faultline (Earth)
Earth.description: Split the ground in a line you can see. Creatures crossing it or standing on it must make a Dexterity save or take 8d8 Quake damage and fall Prone. The line counts as hazardous terrain for 2 turns.

Eldritch.name: Eldritch Blast
Eldritch.description: Make a ranged spell attack against a creature you can see within range. This spell uses Eldritch Affinity only; Generic Affinity is not added. On hit, the target takes 1 Eldritch damage.
Eldritch.upcast_rule: x2, fire 1 additional blast as a separate spell attack

Eldritch.name: Eldritch Tentacle
Eldritch.description: Choose a creature you can see within range. It must make a Strength save against 10 + Eldritch Affinity. On a failure, it is Grappled, pulled to a space of your choice within 5 ft of you, and remains held while you maintain Concentration. A creature escaping this grapple rolls its Athletics or equivalent escape check against your spell save DC using Eldritch only, not Generic.
Eldritch.upcast_rule: x2, affect 1 additional target with a separate tentacle

Eldritch.name: Eldritch Explosion
Eldritch.description: Eldritch power erupts outward from you. All other creatures within 30 ft must make a Wisdom save against 5 + Eldritch Affinity. On a failure, a creature takes 15 Eldritch damage. On a success, it takes no damage unless another feature says otherwise.
Eldritch.upcast_rule: x2, increase radius by 10 ft and damage by +15

Eldritch.name: Eldritch Shadow
Eldritch.description: Concentration. This spell may be cast as a Bonus Action. You gain the Invisible condition until you make an attack. While invisible from this spell, any attack you make that deals Eldritch damage deals 1.5x more damage.
Eldritch.upcast_rule: x10, you do not lose invisibility from attacking; may only be upcast this way once

Fire.name: Cauterize
Fire.description: Touch a creature. If it is Bleeding, that condition ends immediately. The target then takes 1d4 Fire damage and gains Burned for 1 turn. If the target is unwilling, make a spell attack against it first.

Fire.name: Firebolt
Fire.description: Make a spell attack against a creature you can see. On hit, the target takes 1d10 + 4 Fire damage.

Fire.name: Fireball
Fire.description: Choose a point you can see within range. A flaming sphere streaks to that point and bursts on impact. All creatures in a 15 ft radius must make a Dexterity save. On a failure they take 2d6 + 6 Fire damage; on a success they take half.

Fire.name: Fireburst
Fire.description: Choose a point you can see within range. The blast becomes dense and forceful rather than just hot. All creatures in a 20 ft radius must make a Dexterity save. On a failure they take 4d6 + 8 Fire damage and gain Burned. On a success they take half damage and do not gain Burned. Objects that are flammable ignite.

Fire.name: Inferno Ring
Fire.description: Choose a point you can see within range. A circular wall of erupting flame forms in a 25 ft radius around that point and lasts for 3 turns. Creatures in the ring when it appears must make a Dexterity save or take 5d6 + 12 Fire damage and gain Burned. A creature that ends its turn in the ring takes 2d6 + 8 Fire damage. This spell requires Concentration.

Fire.name: Cataclysm Pyre
Fire.description: Choose a point you can see within range. A towering mass of fire detonates in a 30 ft radius. All creatures in the area must make a Dexterity save. On a failure they take 8d6 + 12 Fire damage, gain On Fire. On a success they take half damage and still gain On Fire. After resolving the blast, the ground in the radius burns until the end of your next turn; creatures entering or ending their turn there take 2d6 + 6 Fire damage.
Fire.upcast_rule: x2, +3d6 blast damage and +1d6 ground damage

Force.name: Telekinesis
Force.description: Move a Large or smaller object (~200 lbs) or creature with your mind for 3 turns. You can lift, push, pull, or hold at a speed of 30 ft per turn. An unwilling creature can make a Str save to resist being moved. You may also use this to interact with objects at range.

Gel.name: Gel Trap
Gel.description: Cover the ground in sticky gel. Creatures entering or starting their turn there must make a Str save or become Restrained and gain the Gelled condition. Escaping requires a Strength check vs your Spell Save DC. The gel lasts for 3 turns or until fire damage is dealt to the area, which burns it away.

Gel.name: Gel Coating
Gel.description: Coat yourself in a thin layer of corrosive gel for 3 turns. You gain +2 AC and Advantage on checks to escape or resist a Grapple. A creature that hits you with an unarmed attack or a natural weapon, or that successfully Grapples you, takes 2d6 Gel damage. While coated, your unarmed attacks and Grapple damage deal an additional 2d6 Gel damage. If you take Fire damage while coated, the gel ignites and is consumed: you take double Fire damage from that source and the spell ends immediately. This spell requires Concentration.

Gel.name: Gel Shaper
Gel.description: Shape raw gel into any non-living object you can hold or place which you can see or imagine. The object is solid, about as durable as copper, and has the material modifier of a Steel item (see [[2.6 Materials]] for more). A weapon created this way uses the statblock of any weapon from [[2.5 Weapons, Armors, and Tools]] but deals Gel damage instead of its listed type. You are proficient with this weapon. The object lasts permanently after creation (until you make another one). You may only have one such object shaped at a time; shaping a new one causes the previous to dissolve.

Gel.name: Caustic Prison
Gel.description: Choose a creature you can see within range. A shell of corrosive gel forms around it. The target takes 4d6 Gel damage at the start of each of its turns for 3 turns. Each time it takes this damage, it must make a Con save (DC 10 + Gel Affinity) or gain a stack of the Gelled condition. Fire damage dealt to the target while the spell is active removes the gel instantly (but not the gelled condition), the target takes no further damage from this spell but takes double Fire damage from that source.

Gel.name: Gel Bulwark
Gel.description: Shape a wall of solid, corrosive gel in any contiguous shape you choose within range (shape it takes up must be empty), up to a total volume of 10 ft x 10 ft x 10 ft. The wall provides full cover and is semi-transparent. A creature that touches the wall or starts its turn adjacent to it takes 4d8 Gel damage and must make a Con save (DC 10 + Gel Affinity) or gain a stack of the Gelled Condition. You may use a Bonus Action on subsequent turns to move the wall up to 20 ft in any direction, forcing the save against any creature it passes through. If a creature starts their turn inside of the wall they instantly take 4d10 Gel damage and gain two stacks of the Gelled condition. This spell requires Concentration.

Gel.name: Gel Sovereign
Gel.description: Summon a Gel Slime in an unoccupied space you can see within range. The slime is a summoned companion with level equal to your level - 2, has its own turn in Initiative, and perfectly obeys your commands. The slime uses the monster statblock of a Gel Slime at its level. If you have greater than 30 Affinity in any other element, you may instead summon a slime of that element, but at level - 3 (minimum level 1). For monster statblocks see [[7.3.1.1 Slimes]]. You may only have up to one slime companion per 5 levels summoned at a time (at level 5 you may have one at level 10 you may have two and so on), when this slime dies it fades into nothing and does not leave behind a core or mass. Summoning a new slime (above your max) will cause the oldest summoned slime to disappear.

Ice/Cold.name: Flash Freeze
Ice/Cold.description: Make a spell attack against a creature with the Soaked condition. On hit, deal 2d6 + Ice/Cold Affinity Ice/Cold damage and apply 2 stacks of Frozen.

Ice/Cold.name: Flash Freeze (Unique)
Ice/Cold.description: Make a spell attack against a creature with the Soaked condition. On hit, deal 2d6 + Ice/Cold Affinity Ice/Cold damage and apply 2 stacks of Frozen.

Ice/Cold.name: Sleet Storm
Ice/Cold.description: Freezing rain and hail pound the area for 3 turns. The area is heavily obscured and becomes Difficult Terrain. Creatures entering or ending their turn there take 2d6 Cold damage and must make a Dex save or fall Prone.

Ice/Cold.name: Deep Freeze
Ice/Cold.description: Target a creature. They must make a Con save. On fail take 4d6 Cold damage and gain 4 stacks of Frozen. If Soaked, increase stacks to 6. If already Frozen, become Petrified for 1 turn.

Ice/Cold.name: Glacial Prison
Ice/Cold.description: Choose a point. Creatures must make a Con save. On fail take 6d6 Cold damage and gain 4 stacks Frozen. Any creature that reaches max Frozen becomes Petrified for 1 turn. The area becomes Difficult Terrain.

Ice/Cold.name: Absolute Zero
Ice/Cold.description: Target a creature with at least 2 stacks of Frozen or the Soaked condition, they must make a Con save. On fail take 15d6 Cold damage and gain 10 stacks of Frozen and be petrified for 1 turn.

Ice/Cold.name: Frozen Cataclysm
Ice/Cold.description: A catastrophic freeze overtakes the area. All creatures must make a Con save. On fail take 10d6 Cold damage and gain 20 stacks Frozen. Any creature affected becomes Petrified for 2 turns. The area remains frozen for 2 turns, applying 2 stacks Frozen to creatures entering or ending their turn there and dealing 10d6 Ice/Cold damage.

Infernal.name: Hellfire Orb
Infernal.description: Hurl a dark fire orb. Make a separate spell attack against each creature within a 20 ft radius of impact. On hit, deal 4d8 Infernal damage and apply Hellfire.

Infernal.name: Desperate Pact
Infernal.description: Touch a willing creature. It gains +2 to all d20 rolls for 2 turns. If it drops below 25% of its max HP while the pact is active, the pact ends early and it takes 5d8 Infernal damage.
Infernal.upcast_rule: x2, +1 turn duration and +2 to rolls

Infernal.name: Devil’s Brand
Infernal.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 6d8 Infernal damage and brand the target with Hellfire for 3 turns. While branded, if the target damages one of your allies, it immediately takes 4d8 Infernal damage.

Infernal.name: Pitflame Circuit
Infernal.description: Choose up to 3 creatures you can see. Make separate spell attacks. On hit, each takes 8d8 Infernal damage and gains Hellfire. If two branded targets move within 10 ft of each other, both take 4d8 Infernal damage once per turn.

Infernal.name: Contract Pyre
Infernal.description: Choose one creature. It must make a Charisma save. On fail, take 10d8 Infernal damage, gain Hellfire, and for 2 turns whenever it casts a spell or uses a magical ability it takes 5d8 Infernal damage.

Infernal.name: Thronefire
Infernal.description: A circle of infernal law ignites. Creatures in the area must make a Charisma save. On fail, take 12d8 Infernal damage, gain Hellfire, and for 3 turns take 4d8 Infernal damage whenever they attack, cast, or move more than 15 ft in a turn.
Infernal.upcast_rule: x2, +4d8 entry damage and +2d8 trigger damage

Lightning.name: Static Shock
Lightning.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 2d6 Lightning damage and apply Shocked. The bolt then arcs to a second creature within 15 ft, dealing 1d6 Lightning damage and applying Shocked.
Lightning.upcast_rule: x2, arc to a third creature

Lightning.name: Paralytic Bolt
Lightning.description: Make a spell attack. On hit deal 3d6 Lightning damage and the target gains Shocked for 2 turns. If the target is already Shocked, they must make a Con save or become Paralyzed for 1 turn.

Lightning.name: Chain Lightning
Lightning.description: Make a spell attack against a target. On hit deal 6d6 Lightning damage and apply Shocked. The bolt then jumps to up to 2 additional creatures within 15 ft, making separate attack rolls at -2 per jump. If a creature hit is already Shocked, they must make a Con save or become Paralyzed.

Lightning.name: Lightning Surge
Lightning.description: Choose a point. A lightning bolt detonates outward. Creatures must make a Dex save. On fail take 8d6 Lightning damage and gain 2 stacks of Shocked. Any creature with Shocked must immediately make a Con save or become Paralyzed for 1 turn. Creatures that succeed take half damage and gain 1 stack of Shocked.

Lightning.name: Lightning Collapse
Lightning.description: A violent lightning field forms and collapses instantly. Creatures must make a Dex save. On fail take 10d6 Lightning damage, gain 2 stacks Shocked, and are struck again for 5d6 Lightning damage if already Shocked. Creatures failing the second check are Paralyzed for 2 turns.

Lightning.name: Judgment Strike
Lightning.description: Lightning repeatedly strikes all creatures in the area. Each creature must make a Dex save. On fail take 10d8 Lightning damage and gain 3 stacks Shocked. At the start of their next turn, all affected creatures are struck again for 8d8 Lightning damage. Any creature with Shocked must make a Con save or become Paralyzed for 2 turns.

Magma.name: Magma Ball
Magma.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 4d8 Magma damage, apply On Fire x3, and the magma hardens, reducing the target’s Speed to 0 until it breaks free with a Strength check vs your Spell Save DC.

Magma.name: Crustbreaker
Magma.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 7d8 Magma damage, apply On Fire x4, and create a hardened shell around one limb or section of the target. The target has Disadvantage on its next attack or loses 10 ft movement, your choice on hit.

Magma.name: Lava Mantle
Magma.description: Coat yourself in flowing magma for 3 turns. You gain Resistance to Fire, creatures hitting you in melee take 3d8 Magma damage, and any creature you hit with a melee attack or touch spell gains On Fire x3 immediately. Concentration.

Magma.name: Volcanic Snap
Magma.description: Choose a point on the ground. Magma erupts upward in a focused column. Creatures in a 10 ft radius must make a Dexterity save. On fail, take 8d8 Magma damage, gain On Fire x5, and become Blinded for 1 turn. On success, take half. The ground remains molten until the end of your next turn.

Magma.name: Caldera Break
Magma.description: Split the battlefield open into a brief caldera. Creatures in the area must make a Dexterity save. On fail, take 12d8 Magma damage, gain On Fire x6, and become Blinded for 2 turns. The area remains molten for 2 turns and deals 3d8 Magma damage to creatures entering or ending their turn there.

Metal.name: Mend
Metal.description: Repair a non-magical object or construct up to 1 ft cube. Cracks seal, breaks rejoin. Cannot restore destroyed items.
Metal.upcast_rule: x2, repair up to 3 ft cube

Metal.name: Iron Grave
Metal.description: Choose a creature you can see within range. Jagged metal spikes erupt from the ground and surrounding space, snapping inward with crushing force. The target must make a Strength save. On a failure, it takes 4d8 Metal damage, becomes Grappled (DC = Spell Save DC), and gains Pierced. While Grappled in this way, the creature is considered Pinned: it cannot stand up, cannot be moved by external effects, and cannot take Dash or Disengage actions. At the start of each of its turns while pinned, it gains 2 stacks of Hurting as the metal tightens. On a success, the creature takes half damage and is not Grappled, but still gains Pierced.

Metal.name: Iron Dominion
Metal.description: Choose a point you can see. Metallic structures erupt violently from the ground in a 15 ft radius, forming spikes, walls, and cages simultaneously. Creatures in the area must make a Strength save. On a failure, they take 8d8 Metal damage, become Grappled, gain Pierced, and have their movement reduced to 0 while inside the structure. While Grappled this way, they take 3 stacks of Hurting per turn instead of 2. The terrain becomes Impassable Terrain for all creatures except the caster. On a success, creatures take half damage and are not Grappled but must treat the area as Difficult Terrain.

Metal.name: Blade Barrier
Metal.description: Whirling metal blades form a wall for 3 turns. Creatures passing through must make a Dex save. On fail, they take 6d8 Metal damage and gain Pierced. On success, they take half damage. The wall blocks line of sight and movement. This spell requires Concentration.

Metal.name: Steel Catacomb
Metal.description: A massive prison of metal forms instantly, enclosing the area in a crushing lattice. Creatures must make a Strength save. On a failure, they take 10d8 Metal damage, become Grappled, gain Pierced, and are fully Restrained (cannot take Actions that require movement or weapon use requiring space). At the start of each turn, they take 4 stacks of Hurting. If they fail their escape check by 5 or more, they instead take an additional 6d8 Metal damage as the structure crushes inward.

Metal.name: Iron Judgment
Metal.description: The battlefield is forcibly reshaped into a killing structure. All creatures in the area must make a Strength save. On a failure, they take 12d8 Metal damage, become Grappled, gain Pierced, and are Pinned and Restrained simultaneously. At the start of each turn, they take 5 stacks of Hurting, and cannot regain movement by any means except escaping the grapple. Any forced movement into or out of the structure deals 8d8 Metal damage due to tearing metal edges.

Metal.name: Worldforge Collapse
Metal.description: The entire area collapses into a dense, grinding mass of metal. All creatures must make a Strength save. On a failure, they take 14d8 Metal damage, become Pinned, Restrained, and gain Pierced. At the start of each turn, they take 6 stacks of Hurting and 6d8 Metal damage if they fail to escape. Any creature that escapes is immediately pushed out and takes 6d8 Metal damage from tearing free. On a success, they take half damage and are not restrained but still gain Pierced.
Metal.upcast_rule: x2, +8d8 damage and +1 Hurting stack per turn

Miasma.name: Miasma Cloud
Miasma.description: Concentration. Create a 20 ft cloud. Creatures inside at the end of their turn take 4d4 Miasma damage and gain Diseased and Poisoned while in the cloud and for 1 turn after leaving.

Miasma.name: Rot Lung
Miasma.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 3d8 Miasma damage and the target gains Diseased, Poisoned, and Suffocating for 1 turn. If already Diseased or Poisoned, it instead also gains Necrosis x2.

Miasma.name: Grave Weather
Miasma.description: Concentration. Spread a dense miasmic weather front for 3 turns. Creatures entering or ending their turn there take 3d8 Miasma damage and gain Diseased and Poisoned. Creatures already suffering both also gain Necrosis x3.

Miasma.name: Sepulcher Breath
Miasma.description: Choose a creature. It must make a Constitution save. On fail, take 4d8 Miasma damage, gain Diseased, Poisoned, Suffocating for 2 turns, and Necrosis x4. On success, take half and gain Diseased.

Miasma.name: Rot Kingdom
Miasma.description: Concentration. Create a catastrophic death-fog. Creatures in the area must make a Constitution save. On fail, take 8d8 Miasma damage, gain Diseased, Poisoned, Suffocating for 3 turns, and Necrosis x2. Creatures already suffering Diseased or Poisoned instead gain Necrosis x5.

Mirage.name: Mirage
Mirage.description: Create 1 illusory duplicate of yourself. Enemies gain 1 level of disadvantage on attack rolls against you for each duplicate.

Mirage.name: Mirror Image
Mirage.description: Create 3 illusory duplicates that surround you for 3 turns. When a creature attacks you, roll a d4. On a 1, the attack hits you. On a 2-4, it destroys a duplicate instead. Each destroyed duplicate reduces the die size by 1 (1-2 will hit you then 1-3 will hit you, etc).

Mirage.name: False Advance
Mirage.description: Create a moving duplicate at a point you can see. Until the end of your next turn, enemies treat it as a real creature unless they pass a Wisdom save. You may also immediately move 15 ft without provoking opportunity attacks.

Mirage.name: Hall of Glass
Mirage.description: Create 2 duplicates and choose one creature you can see. Until the start of your next turn, that creature must make a Wisdom save before targeting you; on a failure, it must target a duplicate or lose the attack / spell.

Mirage.name: Mirage Host
Mirage.description: Fill an area with false bodies, false terrain, and false openings for 3 turns. Creatures inside treat all movement as Difficult Terrain unless they pass a Wisdom save at the start of turn. On failure, they also cannot make opportunity attacks that turn. Concentration.

Mirage.name: Sovereign Reflection
Mirage.description: Create 3 duplicates and become the center of a shifting illusion for 3 turns. Until the spell ends, the first time each turn you would be hit, roll d4; on 2–4, the hit instead destroys a duplicate or misses entirely if none remain. While any duplicate remains, your spell attacks gain +2 Accuracy. Concentration.

Mud.name: Mud Slide
Mud.description: A wave of sludge surges out. Creatures in the cone must make a Dexterity save or take 2d6 Mud damage, fall Prone, and gain Slowed for 1 turn. The area becomes Difficult Terrain until the end of your next turn.

Mud.name: Sinkstep
Mud.description: Make a spell attack against a creature you can see. On hit, deal 5d6 Mud damage and the target’s feet become trapped; its Speed becomes 0 until it uses an Action to break free with a Strength check vs your Spell Save DC. Whether or not it breaks free, it gains Slowed for 2 turns.

Mud.name: Mire Field
Mud.description: Turn ground you can see into deep mire for 3 turns. The area is Difficult Terrain, and creatures entering it or ending their turn there gain Slowed for 1 turn. A creature that dashes in the area must make a Dexterity save or fall Prone immediately. Concentration.

Mud.name: Bog Drag
Mud.description: Choose a creature standing on the ground. It must make a Strength save or be dragged half-submerged into the mud, taking 8d6 Mud damage, becoming Prone, and being unable to stand until it escapes with a Strength check vs your Spell Save DC. At the start of each of its turns while trapped, it gains Slowed again.

Mud.name: Swallowing Fen
Mud.description: Create a collapsing mire. Creatures in the area must make a Strength save. On fail, they take 10d8 Mud damage, fall Prone, gain Slowed for 3 turns, and the area becomes heavy mire for 3 turns. A creature knocked Prone in the mire must spend double movement to stand even after escaping it.
Mud.upcast_rule: x2, +3d8 damage and +1 turn mire duration

Necrotic.name: Leech Life
Necrotic.description: Deal 2d6 Necrotic damage to a creature. One ally within 30 ft of the target heals for half the damage dealt.

Necrotic.name: Bane
Necrotic.description: Choose up to 2 creatures you can see within range. Each must make a Charisma save or become Cursed for 3 turns.

Necrotic.name: Rotting Touch
Necrotic.description: Casting this spell consumes an additional 1d4 Vitality. Make a spell attack. On hit, the target gains Bleeding and Diseased for 2 turns. If the target already has either condition, they instead gain 1 stack of Necrosis. If they already have any stacks of Necrosis they will gain two additional stacks instead.

Necrotic.name: Plague Grasp
Necrotic.description: Casting this spell consumes an additional 1d4 Vitality. Make a spell attack. On hit, the target takes 2d6 Necrotic damage, gains Bleeding and Diseased, and immediately gains 2 stacks of Necrosis. If any of these conditions are already present they gain 3 stacks of necrosis instead.

Necrotic.name: Desecrate
Necrotic.description: Desecrate the ground for the duration. Necrotic and Corruption spells deal +2 dice of damage in the area. Radiant spells deal -2 dice (minimum of 0). Undead creatures gain +2 AC while inside. This spell requires Concentration.

Necrotic.name: Contagion Field
Necrotic.description: Casting this spell consumes an additional 1d4 Vitality. Choose a creature. All creatures within 10 ft (and the chosen creature) must make a Con save or gain Diseased for 3 turns. Any creature already Diseased instead gains 3 stacks of necrosis.

Necrotic.name: Death Bloom
Necrotic.description: Casting this spell consumes an additional 1d4 Vitality. A burst of decaying energy spreads outward. Creatures must make a Con save. On fail they take 6d6 Necrotic damage, gain Diseased, and 1 stack of Necrosis. Creatures already affected gain +3 additional stacks of Necrosis instead. If a creature dies from this effect their corpse will explode causing the effect to happen again, you can be hit from the effect of these corpse explosions.

Necrotic.name: Necrotic Collapse
Necrotic.description: Casting this spell consumes an additional 1d6 Vitality. All creatures in the area must make a Con save. On fail they take 8d6 Necrotic damage and gain 3 stacks of Necrosis. For each existing negative condition on a creature, increase damage by +1d6 (+1 for each unique condition and +1 for each stack of Necrosis, necrosis from this instance of this spell will not add to the damage).

Nova.name: Nova Burst
Nova.description: Create a compressed stellar core at a point you can see. It immediately detonates. Creatures must make a Constitution save. On a failure, they take 5d12 Nova damage and become Blinded for 2 turns. On a success, they take half damage and are not Blinded.

Nova.name: Nova Compression
Nova.description: Create a collapsing star core that does not detonate immediately. Creatures in the area must make a Strength save or be pulled 10 ft toward the center. At the start of your next turn, the core detonates. Creatures still in the area must make a Constitution save or take 9d12 Nova damage and become Blinded for 2 turns. Creatures that remained in the inner 10 ft take an additional 7d12 damage.

Nova.name: Supernova Collapse
Nova.description: A star core forms and violently collapses inward. Creatures must make a Strength save or be pulled to the center and Restrained until detonation. At the end of your next turn, the core explodes. Creatures must make a Constitution save. On a failure, they take 12d12 Nova damage, become Blinded for 3 turns, and are thrown 30 ft outward. On a success, they take half damage and are not thrown.

Nova.name: Stellar Annihilation
Nova.description: A massive stellar core forms, compresses, and detonates in a catastrophic sequence. On cast, creatures must make a Strength save or be pulled 15 ft inward. At the start of your next turn, all creatures in the area must make a Constitution save. On a failure, they take 15d12 Nova damage, become Blinded for 4 turns, and are thrown outward. Creatures within 10 ft of the center instead take +10d12 damage.

Nova.name: Terminal Nova
Nova.description: A full stellar collapse event is created. The core forms, compresses, and detonates over 1 turn. Creatures must make a Strength save or be pulled to the center and unable to leave the radius by any means. At the start of your next turn, all creatures must make a Constitution save. On a failure, they take 20d12 Nova damage, become Blinded for 5 turns, and are thrown outward violently. Creatures within 10 ft take an additional 10d12 damage. On a success, they take half damage and are not Blinded.

Obsidian.name: Obsidian Spray
Obsidian.description: Spray a cone of razor-sharp obsidian shards. Creatures in the cone must make a Dex save. On fail, they take 5d8 Obsidian damage and gain Pierced. On success, they take half damage.

Obsidian.name: Obsidian Skin
Obsidian.description: Your skin becomes black glass. Gain +10 AC but -10 ft Speed. Anyone hitting you with melee takes 1d12 Obsidian damage. This spell requires concentration.

Obsidian.name: Glass Carapace
Obsidian.description: Your skin becomes dark strong black glass. Gain +10 AC but -10 ft Speed and resistance to slashing and piercing damage. Anyone hitting you with melee takes 3d12 Obsidian damage. This spell requires concentration.

Obsidian.name: Shard Reprisal
Obsidian.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 4d12 + 15 Obsidian damage and the target gains Pierced. If the target attacks you before the end of your next turn, it takes 2d8 + 10 Obsidian damage immediately after their attack lands.

Obsidian.name: Obsidian Mirror
Obsidian.description: You create an obsidian ward around yourself, this spell requires Concentration. While concentrating, you gain +5 AC. Whenever a creature targets you with a ranged attack, spell attack, or magical effect, it must make a Wisdom save. On a failure, the attacker becomes the target of the attack or effect and suffers its full effects. On a success, half of the effect is applied to the attacker and half is applied to you. Effects that cannot reasonably be divided are instead applied in full to the attacker. Additionally, whenever a creature hits you with a melee attack, it takes 2d8 Obsidian damage.

Obsidian.name: Black Monolith
Obsidian.description: Raise a 15 ft tall and 5 ft wide obsidian monolith in an empty space within range. The monolith has 100 + Obsidian Affinity health and no Vitality with an AC of 20. The monolith provides full cover, blocks movement and line of sight, and lasts until destroyed, dismissed, or your Concentration ends. While the monolith exists, you are encased in obsidian. You gain +5 AC, reduce all incoming damage by 10, and cannot be forcibly moved against your will. Whenever a creature hits you with a melee attack or targets you with a spell attack, it takes 4d8 Obsidian damage. At the cost of a BAp you may cause obsidian spikes to erupt from the ground within 15 ft of the monolith. Creatures of your choice in the area must make a Dexterity save or take 3d8 Obsidian damage and gain Pierced. When the monolith is destroyed or dismissed, it explodes into razor-sharp shards. Creatures within 20 ft must make a Dexterity save. On a failure, they take 16d8 Obsidian damage and gain Pierced. On a success, they take half damage and do not gain Pierced. This spell requires Concentration. When you make BAp spell attacks you may not add your Base Magic Damage to the damage of the attack. Each time you cast one of the BAp spell attacks you must expend 1/4 (rounding down) of the mana cost of the spell.

Poison.name: Contagion
Poison.description: Choose a creature you can see within range. The target must make a Constitution save. On a failure, the target takes 4d8 Poison damage, gains 2 stacks of Poisoned, and suffers a -2 penalty to all d20 rolls for 2 turns as the venom weakens their body and focus. On a success, the target takes half damage and gains 1 stack of Poisoned but does not suffer the roll penalty. If the target is already Poisoned when struck by this spell, increase the damage by +2d8 and increase the d20 penalty to -4 for the duration instead.

Poison.name: Venom Burst
Poison.description: Choose a point or creature you can see within range. Poison erupts outward in a violent splash. All creatures in a 15 ft radius must make a Constitution save. On a failure, a creature takes 8d8 Poison damage, gains 3 stacks of Poisoned, and suffers -3 to all d20 rolls for 3 turns. On a success, the creature takes half damage and gains 1 stack of Poisoned. Any creature already Poisoned before making the save instead takes +4d8 damage and has its Poisoned duration refreshed to the highest duration currently on it.

Poison.name: Blight Venom
Poison.description: Choose a creature you can see within range. The target must make a Constitution save. On a failure, the target takes 10d8 Poison damage, gains 4 stacks of Poisoned, suffers -4 to all d20 rolls, and has its movement halved for 3 turns as the toxin spreads through its muscles and lungs. On a success, the target takes half damage, gains 2 stacks of Poisoned, and has no movement reduction. If the target is already Poisoned, it must also make a second Constitution save after the first; on a failure, it becomes Paralyzed for 1 turn from systemic venom shock.

Poison.name: Poison Tide
Poison.description: Choose a point you can see within range. A crushing wave of poisonous fluid and vapor floods the area. All creatures in a 25 ft radius must make a Constitution save. On a failure, a creature takes 12d8 Poison damage, gains 5 stacks of Poisoned, suffers -5 to all d20 rolls, and has its movement reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn. On a success, the creature takes half damage, gains 2 stacks of Poisoned, and suffers -2 to all d20 rolls for 1 turn. Creatures already Poisoned automatically take an additional 5d8 Poison damage before resolving the rest of the spell.

Poison.name: Plaguefall
Poison.description: Choose a point you can see within range. The area collapses under a catastrophic saturation of lethal poison. All creatures in a 30 ft radius must make a Constitution save. On a failure, a creature takes 15d8 Poison damage, gains 6 stacks of Poisoned, suffers -6 to all d20 rolls for 4 turns, and at the start of its next turn immediately takes an additional 10d8 Poison damage. On a success, the creature takes half damage, gains 3 stacks of Poisoned, and suffers -3 to all d20 rolls for 2 turns. Any creature already Poisoned when hit by this spell instead treats a successful save as a failed save for the purposes of condition application.
Poison.upcast_rule: x2, +10d8 initial damage and +4d8 delayed damage

Psychic.name: Steady Mind
Psychic.description: Remove Demoralized, Despair, and Frightened from a creature you can see.

Psychic.name: Mind Fog
Psychic.description: This spell requires concentration. Choose a creature, they must make a Wis save or gain the Psychic Drain condition. This condition is not removable unless concentration is broken or the target runs out of vitality.

Psychic.name: Thought Pierce
Psychic.description: Target must make a Wis save. On fail take 2d8 + Psychic Affinity Psychic damage and gain the Frightened condition. If already Frightened, they are Stunned for 1 turn instead.

Psychic.name: Scry
Psychic.description: Observe a creature you know personally (have met, know by name) from afar for 5 minutes. You see through its eyes and hear through its ears. The target makes a Wis save; on a success, it senses it is being watched but cannot identify you. On a failure, it is unaware.

Psychic.name: Mind Break
Psychic.description: Target must make an Int save. On fail take 4d8 + Psychic Affinity Psychic damage and gain the Enraged condition, if they already have the Enraged condition they instead take an additional 2d6 Psychic damage.

Psychic.name: Psychic Collapse
Psychic.description: This spell requires concentration. Creatures must make a Wis save. On fail take 6d8 + Psychic Affinity Psychic damage and gain the Demoralized condition, if they already have the Demoralized condition they instead gain Despair. During concentration all creatures who failed their save also gain the Psychic Drain condition.

Psychic.name: Ego Shatter
Psychic.description: Creatures must make an Int save. On fail take 8d8 + Psychic Affinity Psychic damage and gain the Despair condition, if they already have Despair they instead take an additional 2d10 Psychic damage and are stunned for one turn. All creatures who fail their save by more than 3 also gain the Psychic Drain condition for 3 turns.
Psychic.upcast_rule: x2, +2d6 damage, Psychic Drain loses an additional 20% of target's maximum Vitality up to 80%

Quake.name: Earthquake
Quake.description: The ground shakes violently. Creatures within 50 ft must make a Strength save or fall Prone and take 4d8 Quake damage. Structures take double damage.

Quake.name: Fossilize
Quake.description: Choose a creature which is at least one size smaller than you. It must make a Con save (DC 10 + Quake Affinity). On fail, it becomes Petrified for 2 turns. On success, it is Slowed for 1 turn instead.

Quake.name: Faultline (Quake)
Quake.description: Split the ground in a line you can see. Creatures crossing it or standing on it must make a Dexterity save or take 8d8 Quake damage and fall Prone. The line counts as hazardous terrain for 2 turns.

Quake.name: Upheaval
Quake.description: Massive vertical shockwaves hurl terrain upward. Creatures in range must make a Strength save. On fail, take 10d8 Quake damage, fall Prone, and are launched 10 ft up before landing. Structures and unsecured objects are heavily disrupted.

Quake.name: Tectonic Crush
Quake.description: Choose a creature standing on solid ground. It must make a Strength save. On fail, take 12d8 Quake damage, become Prone, and the ground clamps around it so it cannot stand until it passes a Strength check vs your Spell Save DC.

Quake.name: Continental Break
Quake.description: An overwhelming seismic event erupts around you. Creatures in range must make a Strength save. On fail, take 16d8 Quake damage, fall Prone, and all ground in the area becomes shattered, unstable terrain for 3 turns. Structures take double damage throughout.

Radiant.name: Manaskin
Radiant.description: Touch a creature. It gains Resistance to Elemental Damage for 3 turns.

Radiant.name: Bless
Radiant.description: Choose up to 2 creatures you can see within range. They gain the Blessed condition for 3 turns.

Radiant.name: Radiant Pulse
Radiant.description: Emit a burst of radiant energy. Target must make a Con save. On fail take 2d6 Radiant damage and become Blinded for 1 turn. If the target is of the Evil Alignment they take an additional 5 Radiant damage. If the target is of a Good Alignment they take half damage.

Radiant.name: Radiant Wave
Radiant.description: A wave of radiant energy expands outward. All creatures must make a Con save. On fail take 3d6 Radiant damage and become Blinded for 1 turn. Allies instead heal 1d6 Vitality. If the target is of the Evil Alignment they take an additional 10 Radiant damage. If the target is of a Good Alignment they take half damage.

Radiant.name: Consecrate
Radiant.description: Consecrate the ground for the duration. Radiant spells deal +2 dice of damage in the area. Necrotic and Corruption spells deal -2 dice (minimum of 0). Undead creatures have Disadvantage on all rolls while inside. This spell requires Concentration.

Radiant.name: Spirit Guardians
Radiant.description: Spectral guardians circle you for 3 turns. An enemy entering the aura for the first time on a turn takes 3d8 Radiant damage and becomes Slowed for 1 turn. If it tries to leave the aura, it takes 3d8 Radiant damage again. This spell requires Concentration.

Radiant.name: Solar Lance (Radiant)
Radiant.description: The beam intensifies into a wider, sustained blast. Creatures must make a Dexterity save. On a failure, they take 5d10 Solar damage, become Blinded for 2 turns, and cannot benefit from advantage or invisibility effects during that time. Undead automatically fail the Blind effect portion of the save. On a success, they take half damage.

Radiant.name: Resurrection
Radiant.description: Touch a creature that has been dead for less than 10 minutes. It returns to life with 1 HP.
Radiant.upcast_rule: x2, increase the maximum time since death by 10 minutes per upcast, to a maximum of 48 hours

Radiant.name: Divine Eruption
Radiant.description: A massive radiant explosion. Creatures must make a Con save. On fail take 6d6 Radiant damage and are Blinded for 2 turns. Allies instead gain Blessed for 2 turns. If the target is of the Evil Alignment they take an additional 20 Radiant damage. If the target is of a Good Alignment they take half damage.

Radiant.name: Ascension Nova
Radiant.description: A blinding explosion of divine energy. Creatures must make a Con save. On fail take 8d6 Radiant damage, are Blinded, and cannot have advantage for 2 turns. Allies in the area heal 2d6 Vitality and 1d6 Health. If the target is of the Evil Alignment they take an additional 25 Radiant damage. If the target is of a Good Alignment they take half damage.
Radiant.upcast_rule: x2, +3d6 damage +25 damage to Evil Alignment

Shatter.name: Shatter Mind
Shatter.description: Choose a creature. It must make an Intelligence save. On fail, take 7d8 Shatter damage and become Demoralized. On success, take half.

Shatter.name: Dissonant Whispers
Shatter.description: Choose a creature. It must make a Wis save. On fail, it takes 4d8 Shatter damage. On success, it takes half damage.

Shatter.name: Fracture Thought
Shatter.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 9d8 Shatter damage and split the target’s focus: it must choose on its next turn to either move or take a Bonus Action, but not both.

Shatter.name: Splinter Will
Shatter.description: Choose a creature. It must make an Int save. On fail, take 12d8 Shatter damage, become Demoralized, and the target’s next attack automatically suffers Disadvantage and deals minimum damage if it hits.

Shatter.name: Power Word: Pain
Shatter.description: Choose a creature with 100 HP or fewer. It is wracked with excruciating pain. It is Stunned for 1 turn and its max HP is reduced by 20 until a Long Rest. This effect cannot kill the creature, if it's health would be reduced below 5 it is reduced to 5 instead.

Shatter.name: Glass Soul
Shatter.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 14d8 Shatter damage and the target loses 1 Ap and 1 Rp next turn. If it was already Demoralized, it also becomes Stunned for 1 turn.

Shatter.name: Collapse Identity
Shatter.description: Choose a creature. It must make an Int save. On fail, take 18d8 Shatter damage, become Demoralized for 3 turns, lose 1 Ap and 1 Rp next turn, and cannot benefit from morale, inspiration, or courage-style effects until the end of your next turn.
Shatter.upcast_rule: x2, +5d8 damage and +1 Ap loss step once only

Solar.name: Solar Beam
Solar.description: Fire a concentrated beam of pure solar energy in a 5 ft wide line. Creatures must make a Dexterity save. On a failure, they take 6d10 Solar damage and become Blinded for 1 turn. Undead and shadow-based creatures take double damage and are also Stunned for 1 turn. On a success, they take half damage and are not Blinded.

Solar.name: Solar Lance (Solar)
Solar.description: The beam intensifies into a wider, sustained blast. Creatures must make a Dexterity save. On a failure, they take 5d10 Solar damage, become Blinded for 2 turns, and cannot benefit from advantage or invisibility effects during that time. Undead automatically fail the Blind effect portion of the save. On a success, they take half damage.

Solar.name: Solar Lance (Solar)
Solar.description: The beam intensifies into a wider, sustained blast. Creatures must make a Dexterity save. On a failure, they take 5d10 Solar damage, become Blinded for 2 turns, and cannot benefit from advantage or invisibility effects during that time. Undead automatically fail the Blind effect portion of the save. On a success, they take half damage.

Solar.name: Solar Collapse
Solar.description: Choose a point. A sphere of condensed sunlight collapses inward before exploding outward. Creatures must make a Constitution save. On a failure, they take 8d10 Solar damage, become Blinded for 2 turns, and have their Perception-based checks automatically fail while blinded this way. Creatures relying on sight for abilities cannot use those abilities. On a success, they take half damage and are not Blinded.

Solar.name: Solar Collapse
Solar.description: Choose a point. A sphere of condensed sunlight collapses inward before exploding outward. Creatures must make a Constitution save. On a failure, they take 8d10 Solar damage, become Blinded for 2 turns, and have their Perception-based checks automatically fail while blinded this way. Creatures relying on sight for abilities cannot use those abilities. On a success, they take half damage and are not Blinded.

Solar.name: Solar Judgment
Solar.description: The area is flooded with overwhelming solar radiance. Creatures must make a Constitution save. On a failure, they take 11d10 Solar damage, become Blinded for 3 turns, and are Marked by Light for 3 turns: attacks against them gain Advantage and they cannot benefit from stealth, invisibility, or concealment. Undead take double damage and are Stunned for 1 turn automatically.

Solar.name: Solar Cataclysm
Solar.description: A miniature sun forms and detonates with absolute radiance. Creatures must make a Constitution save. On a failure, they take 15d10 Solar damage, become Blinded for 4 turns, and are Marked by Light for 4 turns. At the start of their next turn, they take an additional 5d10 Solar damage as the light continues burning through them. Undead take double total damage and are Stunned for 2 turns. On a success, they take half damage and are Blinded for 1 turn.

Sorrow.name: Despair Aura
Sorrow.description: An aura of overwhelming sadness surrounds you. Enemies within 20 ft must make a Wisdom save or gain Despair and cannot attack you while affected. Concentration.

Sorrow.name: Mourning Glance
Sorrow.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 5d8 Sorrow damage and the target gains Despair for 2 turns. While affected, it cannot willingly move closer to you.

Sorrow.name: Grief Well
Sorrow.description: Choose a point. Creatures in the area must make a Wisdom save. On fail, take 7d8 Sorrow damage, gain Despair, and suffer -2 to all attack rolls for 2 turns.

Sorrow.name: Widow’s Field
Sorrow.description: For 3 turns, enemies in the aura must make a Wisdom save at the start of their turn or gain Despair and lose their Bonus Action that turn. Creatures already under Despair take 4d8 Sorrow damage when they fail this save. Concentration.

Sorrow.name: Last Lament
Sorrow.description: Choose a creature you can see. It must make a Wisdom save. On fail, take 10d8 Sorrow damage, gain Despair for 3 turns, and for that duration the creature cannot willingly target you or your chosen ally with hostile actions. On success, take half and gain Despair for 1 turn.

Starlight.name: Stardust
Starlight.description: Release a shimmering cone of stellar dust. Creatures in the cone must make a Wisdom save or become Hypnotized for 1 turn. You must give the command immediately. Creatures that fail also emit dim light and cannot benefit from concealment until the start of their next turn.

Starlight.name: Guiding Constellation
Starlight.description: Make a spell attack against a creature you can see. On hit, deal 5d8 Starlight damage and the target becomes Stunned for 1 turn. Until the end of your next turn, attacks against that target gain +2 Accuracy as star-motes trace its movement.

Starlight.name: Falling Choir
Starlight.description: Choose up to 3 creatures you can see. Make a separate spell attack against each. On hit, each target takes 6d8 Starlight damage and becomes Stunned for 1 turn. If at least two targets are hit, you may immediately move one willing creature you can see up to 15 ft without provoking reactions, as the starlight guides them.

Starlight.name: Celestial Script
Starlight.description: Inscribe a radiant constellation in the air for 3 turns. While it remains, choose one creature each turn that you can see within 120 ft; that creature must make a Wisdom save or become Hypnotized and Stunned for 1 turn. If it succeeds, it instead sheds light and loses invisibility or stealth-based benefits until the end of its next turn. This spell requires Concentration.

Starlight.name: Heavenfall Pattern
Starlight.description: Make a spell attack against a creature you can see. On hit, deal 12d8 Starlight damage, the target becomes Stunned for 2 turns, and all allies who attack that target before the end of your next turn gain Advantage. If the target dies while affected, you may immediately choose a new target within 30 ft and repeat the attack once.

Steam.name: Scald
Steam.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 4d8 Steam damage and the target gains Burned x2. Until the end of its next turn, it cannot benefit from cold-based concealment or invisibility.

Steam.name: Boiler Jet
Steam.description: Fire a pressurized jet of steam. Make one spell attack against each creature in the line. On hit, deal 5d8 Steam damage and apply Burned x2. Unattended glass, ice, and fragile objects in the line may shatter at GM discretion.

Steam.name: Whiteout Vent
Steam.description: Vent superheated steam around yourself for 3 turns. The area is heavily obscured, creatures inside at the end of their turn take 4d6 Steam damage and gain Burned x2, and creatures outside cannot make opportunity attacks through the steam. Concentration.

Steam.name: Pressure Crown
Steam.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 8d8 Steam damage, apply Burned x3, and the target’s vision blurs so badly that it has Disadvantage on its next attack roll. If the target is Soaked, increase the damage by +4d8.

Steam.name: Engine Rupture
Steam.description: Choose a creature you can see. It must make a Constitution save as its internal pressure violently spikes. On fail, take 12d8 Steam damage, gain Burned x4, and every creature within 10 ft takes 6d8 Steam damage and gains Burned x2 from the blast-off. On success, the primary target takes half and the secondary spray does not occur.

Storm.name: Tempest Strike
Storm.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 4d8 Storm damage and the target gains Soaked and Storm Shocked.

Storm.name: Storm Call
Storm.description: You summon a raging storm centered on a point you can see within range. The storm lasts until your Concentration ends. While concentrating, you may call down bolts of lightning from the storm. Each bolt requires either 1 AP or 1 BAp and targets a creature you can see within the storm. Make a spell attack for each bolt. On hit, the target takes 1d10 Storm damage. Any number of bolts may be called down each turn, provided you have sufficient AP or BAp remaining to pay their costs. Bolts called down using AP are treated as critical hits. When you make BAp spell attacks you may not add your Base Magic Damage to the damage of the attack. Each time you cast one of the BAp spell attacks you must expend 1/4 (rounding down) of the mana cost of the spell.

Storm.name: Thunderstorm
Storm.description: You summon a raging storm centered on a point you can see within range. The storm lasts until your Concentration ends. While concentrating, you may call down bolts of lightning from the storm. Each bolt requires either 1 AP or 1 BAp and targets a creature you can see within the storm. Make a spell attack for each bolt. On hit, the target takes 2d10 Storm damage. Any number of bolts may be called down each turn, provided you have sufficient AP or BAp remaining to pay their costs. Bolts called down using AP are treated as critical hits. When you make BAp spell attacks you may not add your Base Magic Damage to the damage of the attack. Each time you cast one of the BAp spell attacks you must expend 1/4 (rounding down) of the mana cost of the spell.

Storm.name: Tempest
Storm.description: You summon a raging tempest centered on a point you can see within range. The storm lasts until your Concentration ends. While concentrating, you may call down bolts of lightning from the storm. Each bolt requires either 1 AP or 1 BAp and targets a creature you can see within the storm. Make a spell attack for each bolt. On hit, the target takes 3d10 Storm damage. Any number of bolts may be called down each turn, provided you have sufficient AP or BAp remaining to pay their costs. Bolts called down using AP are treated as critical hits. When you make BAp spell attacks you may not add your Base Magic Damage to the damage of the attack. Each time you cast one of the BAp spell attacks you must expend 1/4 (rounding down) of the mana cost of the spell.

Storm.name: Hurricane Aura
Storm.description: You summon a devastating hurricane centered on yourself with a radius of 40 ft. The storm lasts until your Concentration ends. While concentrating, you may call down bolts of lightning from the storm. Each bolt requires either 1 AP or 1 BAp and targets a creature you can see within the storm. Make a spell attack for each bolt. On hit, the target takes 4d10 Storm damage. Any number of bolts may be called down each turn, provided you have sufficient AP or BAp remaining to pay their costs. Bolts called down using AP are treated as critical hits. When you make BAp spell attacks you may not add your Base Magic Damage to the damage of the attack. Each time you cast one of the BAp spell attacks you must expend 1/4 (rounding down) of the mana cost of the spell.

Storm.name: Maelstrom
Storm.description: You summon a world-shaking Maelstrom centered on a point you can see within range. The storm has a radius of 60 ft and lasts until your Concentration ends. While concentrating, you may call down bolts of lightning from the storm. Each bolt requires either 1 AP or 1 BAp and targets a creature you can see within the storm. Make a spell attack for each bolt. On hit, the target takes 5d10 Storm damage. Any number of bolts may be called down each turn, provided you have sufficient AP or BAp remaining to pay their costs. Bolts called down using AP are treated as critical hits. When you make BAp spell attacks you may not add your Base Magic Damage to the damage of the attack. Each time you cast one of the BAp spell attacks you must expend 1/4 (rounding down) of the mana cost of the spell.

Thunder.name: Thunderclap
Thunder.description: A concussive boom erupts. Creatures in range must make a Con save or take 4d8 Thunder damage, be pushed 10 ft, and gain Deafened.

Thunder.name: Howling Gale
Thunder.description: A concussive blast erupts from you. Creatures in the area must make a Con save. On fail, they take 3d8 Thunder damage and lose their Reaction until the end of their next turn. On success, they take half damage.

Thunder.name: Resonant Shot
Thunder.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 7d8 Thunder damage and the target gains Deafened for 2 turns. If it is concentrating, it makes its next concentration check with Disadvantage.

Thunder.name: Breaking Note
Thunder.description: Make a spell attack against a creature or object. On hit, deal 9d8 Thunder damage. If the target is wearing heavy armor, carrying a shield, or is made of stone, glass, or metal, deal +4d8 damage.

Thunder.name: Rolling Choir
Thunder.description: Unleash a series of linked sonic cracks. Make one spell attack against each creature in the line. On hit, deal 8d8 Thunder damage and Deafen the target. If two adjacent targets are both hit, both are also pushed 10 ft apart.

Thunder.name: Ruin Chime
Thunder.description: Choose a creature you can see. It must make a Con save. On fail, take 12d8 Thunder damage, gain Deafened for 3 turns, and lose the ability to cast spells with verbal or sound-dependent components during that time. On success, take half and gain Deafened for 1 turn.

Torrent.name: Torrential Smash
Torrent.description: A massive high-pressure blast. Creatures in line must make a Dex save or take 5d8 Torrent damage, be pushed 30 ft, and fall Prone.

Torrent.name: Pressure Ram
Torrent.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 8d8 Torrent damage and the target is pushed up to 20 ft in a straight line. If it collides with a creature, wall, or object, both take 4d8 Bludgeoning damage.

Torrent.name: Breach Current
Torrent.description: Make one spell attack against each creature in a line. On hit, deal 7d8 Torrent damage and push the creature 15 ft. Any creature forced through another creature’s space causes both to take 3d8 Bludgeoning damage.

Torrent.name: Leviathan Drive
Torrent.description: For 3 turns, your movement does not provoke opportunity attacks and once each turn after you move at least 10 ft, you may make a Torrent spell attack against a creature you passed within 10 ft of. On hit, deal 8d8 Torrent damage and push 20 ft. Concentration.

Torrent.name: Breakwater
Torrent.description: Fire a devastating flood-lance. Creatures in the line must make a Dex save. On fail, take 12d8 Torrent damage, be pushed 40 ft, fall Prone, and any collision deals 6d8 Bludgeoning damage. On success, take half and are pushed 10 ft.

Toxin.name: Toxic Cloud
Toxin.description: Create a 15 ft cloud for 3 turns. Creatures ending their turn inside take 2d6 Toxin damage and gain Poisoned and Suffocating until they have been out of the cloud for 2 turns. Concentration.

Toxin.name: Corrosive Breath
Toxin.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 5d8 Toxin damage and the target gains Poisoned and Suffocating for 1 turn. Armor, shields, and mundane gear exposed to this spell may degrade at GM discretion.

Toxin.name: Green Chamber
Toxin.description: Seal a section of space in choking toxic vapor for 3 turns. The area is heavily obscured. Creatures entering or ending their turn there take 4d6 Toxin damage and gain Poisoned and Suffocating. Concentration.

Toxin.name: Caustic Kiss
Toxin.description: Make a melee spell attack. On hit, deal 7d8 Toxin damage, the target gains Poisoned, Suffocating for 2 turns, and until the end of its next turn it has Disadvantage on Concentration checks and similar focus-based checks due to internal caustic pain.

Toxin.name: Suffocation Engine
Toxin.description: Choose a creature you can see. It must make a Constitution save. On fail, take 8d8 Toxin damage, gain Poisoned and Suffocating for 3 turns, and at the start of each of those turns take 3d8 Toxin damage again. On success, take half and gain Poisoned.

Vacuum.name: Pressure Spike
Vacuum.description: Target a creature, they must make a Con Save or gain Suffocating for 2 turns.

Vacuum.name: Gravity Lift
Vacuum.description: Reduce gravity in the area. Creatures and loose objects float 20 ft upward, then drift down over 2 turns. Falling damage from this effect is negated. While ascending or descending, creatures have Disadvantage on melee attacks and cannot take Dash actions. This spell requires Concentration.
Vacuum.upcast_rule: x2, +10 ft radius and float height becomes 40 ft

Vacuum.name: Collapse Point
Vacuum.description: Choose a point. Creatures must make a Con save. On fail take 4d8 Vacuum damage, gain Suffocating, and 2 stacks Hurting. Creatures already Suffocating instead take +2d8 damage.

Vacuum.name: Gravity Tear
Vacuum.description: A crushing void pulls inward. Creatures must make a Str save. On fail take 6d8 Vacuum damage, are pulled to center, gain Suffocating, and 3 stacks Hurting. Collisions deal 3d6 Bludgeoning damage.

Vacuum.name: Event Collapse
