Vacuum.description: Space collapses violently. Creatures must make a Con save. On fail take 8d8 Vacuum damage, gain Suffocating, and 4 stacks Hurting. Creatures already Suffocating instead automatically fail and take +4d8 damage.

Vacuum.name: Singularity Core
Vacuum.description: A temporary singularity forms. Creatures must make a Con save. On fail take 12d8 Vacuum damage, gain Suffocating, and 5 stacks Hurting. All creatures are pulled to center and repeatedly collide for 5d6 Bludgeoning damage. Creatures remain Suffocating for 2 turns after leaving.
Vacuum.upcast_rule: x2, raise dice tier and +4d8 damage

Void.name: Void Dart
Void.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 4d8 Void damage and remove 1 random positive temporary effect from the target. If no effect is removed, deal +2d8 Void damage instead.
Void.upcast_rule: x2, +2d8 damage and remove 1 additional effect

Void.name: Mana Drain
Void.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, the target loses 4d6 Mana. You regain half the mana drained. If the target has no mana, it instead takes 4d8 Void damage.

Void.name: Void Slash
Void.description: Make a melee spell attack with a blade of nothingness. On hit, deal 8d8 Void damage. If this kills a target or destroys an object, the remains are erased completely.

Void.name: Anti-Magic Zone
Void.description: All magic is suppressed in the area for 2 turns. Spells cannot be cast, active magical effects are suppressed, magic items cease functioning, and concentration is broken. Creatures cannot teleport into or out of the zone.
Void.upcast_rule: x2, +1 turn duration and +10 ft radius

Void.name: Null Edge
Void.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 10d8 Void damage and the target loses one active magical effect of your choice that is currently on it, if any. If no such effect exists, deal +4d8 damage instead.

Void.name: Hollow Corridor
Void.description: Draw a line of absence through space. Make one spell attack against each creature in the line. On hit, deal 10d8 Void damage and nonmagical projectiles, mundane barriers, and fragile summoned objects in the line are destroyed or erased if the GM deems them appropriate.

Void.name: Zero Mark
Void.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 14d8 Void damage and mark the target with Null until the end of your next turn: the next source of Resistance it would use is ignored. If it had no Resistance, it instead cannot gain any before the mark ends.

Void.name: Oblivion Cut
Void.description: Make a melee spell attack. On hit, deal 18d8 Void damage. If this reduces the target to 0 Health or destroys an object, it is erased beyond normal recovery methods short of the highest restoration effects. Even on survival, the wound cannot be naturally healed until after a Long Rest.

Warp.name: Warp Step
Warp.description: Teleport up to 30 ft to an unoccupied space. You may bring one willing creature touching you.

Warp.name: Phase Step
Warp.description: Teleport to an unoccupied space you can see. You have Advantage on the first spell attack or weapon attack you make before the end of this turn.

Warp.name: Warp Slice
Warp.description: Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 6d8 Warp damage and teleport the target up to 20 ft to an unoccupied space you can see. If placed in the air, it falls normally.

Warp.name: Fold Path
Warp.description: Create two linked points for 3 turns. The first willing creature each turn entering one point exits the other. An unwilling creature shoved through must make a Wisdom save or become Disoriented, losing its Reaction until the end of its next turn. Concentration.

Warp.name: Sever Distance
Warp.description: Choose a creature you can see. Make a spell attack. On hit, deal 10d8 Warp damage and split its position from reality: until the start of your next turn, attacks against it gain +2 Accuracy, but it cannot take Reactions and moves as if every square costs double movement.

Warp.name: Dislocation Gate
Warp.description: Create a gate under a creature you can see. It must make a Dexterity save. On fail, it is dropped through space and reappears in a point you choose within 60 ft, taking 12d8 Warp damage and falling Prone. If reappearing adjacent to a hazard, cliff, or effect, it resolves normally.
Warp.upcast_rule: x2, +4d8 damage and +20 ft relocation distance

Water.name: Quench
Water.description: Remove the On Fire condition from a creature you can see. If the target is Soaked, end On Fire from all creatures in a 15 ft radius.
Water.upcast_rule: x2, affect all creatures in 15 ft radius burst

Water.name: Cleanse
Water.description: Touch a creature and remove one of the following conditions: On Fire, Burned, Soaked. After 1 upcast, this spell may also remove Poisoned, Diseased, Corrupt, or Necrosis.

Water.name: Waterskin
Water.description: Touch a creature. It gains Resistance to Magical Damage for 3 turns.

Water.name: Cleansing Waters
Water.description: Remove Poisoned, Diseased, and Corrupt from a creature you can see.
Water.upcast_rule: x2, also remove Withered and Plagued

Water.name: Jetstream
Water.description: You fire a concentrated stream of water in a 10 ft line. All creatures in that line must make a Dexterity save. On a failure they take 1d6 Water damage, are pushed to the end of the line, and if they collide with a creature or object all involved creatures take 1d4 Bludgeoning damage. Any creature hit gains the Soaked condition weather they pass or fail the check.

Water.name: Riptide
Water.description: The stream widens and gains crushing force. All creatures in a 20 ft line must make a Dexterity save. On a failure they take 2d6 Water damage and are pushed to the end of the line. Collision with a creature or object deals 2d4 Bludgeoning damage to all involved creatures. On a success they take half damage and are not pushed. Any creature hit gains the Soaked condition weather they pass or fail the check.

Water.name: Undertow
Water.description: Creatures in the area must make a Strength save. On a failure they take 5d8 Deluge damage, are pulled up to 15 ft toward the center of the spell, gain Soaked, and become Demoralized. Any creature already Soaked instead gains Suffocating until the start of its next turn. While Soaked from this spell, the creature has disadvantage on any checks made to maintain Concentration.

Water.name: Floodwall
Water.description: Choose a line up to 30 ft long within range. A wall of rushing water rises there for 3 turns. Creatures in the wall when it appears must make a Strength save or take 4d6 Water damage, become Soaked, and be pushed 15 ft to one side of the wall of your choice. Creatures that try to pass through it during its duration must make the same save again. This spell requires Concentration.

Water.name: Maelstrom
Water.description: You summon a world-shaking Maelstrom centered on a point you can see within range. The storm has a radius of 60 ft and lasts until your Concentration ends. While concentrating, you may call down bolts of lightning from the storm. Each bolt requires either 1 AP or 1 BAp and targets a creature you can see within the storm. Make a spell attack for each bolt. On hit, the target takes 5d10 Storm damage. Any number of bolts may be called down each turn, provided you have sufficient AP or BAp remaining to pay their costs. Bolts called down using AP are treated as critical hits. When you make BAp spell attacks you may not add your Base Magic Damage to the damage of the attack. Each time you cast one of the BAp spell attacks you must expend 1/4 (rounding down) of the mana cost of the spell.

Generic.name: Mana Blast
Generic.description: Choose an affinity type you have at least 3 in and make a magical attack against a creature in range which you can see. On hit deal 1d4 of  your chosen affinity damage.

Generic.name: Heal
Generic.description: Heal a creature you touch 1d6 + Generic Affinity Health

Generic.name: Revitalize
Generic.description: Heal a creature you touch 1d8 + Generic Affinity Vitality

Generic.name: Medicinal Heal
Generic.description: Heal a creature you touch 1d6 + Medicine Score Health

Generic.name: Medicinal Revitalize
Generic.description: Heal a creature you touch 1d8 + Medicine Score Vitality

Generic.name: Restore Energy
Generic.description: Touch a willing creature. It regains 1d8 + Wisdom Modifier Vitality.
Generic.upcast_rule: x2, raise the healing die by one tier (max 1d20) and add +1d4 healing

Generic.name: Purify
Generic.description: Remove one negative condition (Poisoned, Bleeding, Cursed, Blinded, Pierced, or Suffocating) from a creature you touch.

Generic.name: Revivify
Generic.description: Instantly removes one level of exhaustion from the target.

Generic.name: Healing Burst
Generic.description: Heal all creatures within range 1d4 + Generic Affinity Health

Generic.name: Revitalization Burst
Generic.description: Heal all creatures within range 1d6 + Generic Affinity Vitality

Generic.name: Martyr's Bond
Generic.description: Link yourself to one ally for 1 minute. Whenever that ally takes damage, you may choose to take that damage instead. If you do, you gain Resistance to that damage for that instance.

Generic.name: Reactive Ward
Generic.description: Place an invisible ward on a creature that lasts 1 minute. The next time it would take damage, it instead heals for 2d8 + Healer Level HP, then the ward ends.
Generic.upcast_rule: x2, +1d8 healing, +1 instance of damage, x2 duration

Generic.name: Cure Wounds
Generic.description: Touch a willing creature. It regains 1d6 + Wisdom Modifier Health.
Generic.upcast_rule: x2, raise the healing die by one tier (max 1d20) and add +1d4 healing

Generic.name: Blood Heal
Generic.description: You may expend any number of Vitality or Hp, the targeted creature gains as much Vitality or Hp as you expend

Generic.name: Aura of Healing
Generic.description: Heal all creatures within range 1d4 + Generic Affinity Health at the start of your turn. This spell requires concentration

Generic.name: Aura of Revitalization
Generic.description: Heal all creatures within range 1d6 + Generic Affinity Vitality at the start of your turn. This spell requires concentration

Generic.name: Cleansing Burst
Generic.description: Burst of purifying energy. All allies in range remove one condition of their choice and gain the Blessed condition for 2 rounds. Each ally heals 1d4 HP per condition removed from them this way. Each enemy in range must roll a WIS save or gain the Purged condition.

Generic.name: Halo
Generic.description: Requires Concentration. A halo appears above your head for the duration. During the duration your healing spells always heal for max and any creature you kill will be considered Evil Alignment regardless of if they actually were Evil unless they have more Karma than you.

Generic.name: Share Burden
Generic.description: Choose an ally you can see. 50% of all damage that ally takes is instead dealt to you. Physical damage is changed to its magical counterpart. You may end this early as a free action. This spell requires Concentration.

Generic.name: Expose Weakness
Generic.description: Choose a creature you can see within range. It must make a Wisdom save. On a failure, choose one damage type for which you have more than 10 Affinity; the target gains a Weakness to that damage type for 1 turn. A target cannot gain this weakness if it has more than 5 Affinity in that type or already has Resistance/Immunity to it.
Generic.upcast_rule: x2, grant 1 additional chosen weakness type

Generic.name: Sanctuary
Generic.description: Requires Concentration. Create a 15 ft radius zone. Allies inside cannot be targeted by hostile spells or attacks (area effects still affect them) and gain the Blessed condition (condition ends when you exit the Sanctuary). Allies inside heal 1d6 Vitality at the start of your turn.

Generic.name: Restoration
Generic.description: Touch a creature and end one of the following conditions affecting it: Blind, Deafened, Paralyzed, Poisoned.

Generic.name: Remove Curse
Generic.description: Touch a creature or object and end a curse affecting it. This ends Cursed and Hexed. After 3 upcasts, this spell may also remove 1 stack of Slow Death.
Generic.upcast_rule: x2, greater curse-removal effects as allowed by the GM and spell tier

Generic.name: True Strike
Generic.description: Touch a creature. Its next attack ignores all Resistances.
Generic.upcast_rule: x10, that attack also ignores Immunities; may only be upcast this way once

Generic.name: Enlarge or Reduce
Generic.description: Choose a creature within range. It either increases by 1 size category or decreases by 1 size category.
Generic.upcast_rule: x2, increase the size change by 1 additional category

Generic.name: Force Share Burden
Generic.description: Choose a creature you can see, they must make a Wis Save (DC 10 + Generic Affinity). 50% of all damage that you take is instead dealt to the targeted creature. Physical damage is changed to its magical counterpart. You may end this early as a free action. This spell requires Concentration.

Generic.name: Revive
Generic.description: Revive a creature who has been killed within 1 hour, the creature will be stabilized at 1 Hp

Generic.name: Elemental Ward
Generic.description: Touch a creature. Choose one damage type for which you have more than 10 Affinity. The target gains Resistance to that damage type for 1 minute.
Generic.upcast_rule: x2, grant 1 additional chosen resistance type

Generic.name: Rebirth
Generic.description: Touch a creature that died within the last hour. It returns to life with full HP and Vitality, but gains 2 levels of Exhaustion. The creature will have the Blessed condition for 2 hours.

Generic.name: Mana Bolt
Generic.description: Choose an affinity type you have at least 5 in and make a magical attack against a creature in range which you can see. On hit deal 5 + (Affinity Mod / 2) of  your chosen affinity damage.

Generic.name: Mana Bomb
Generic.description: Choose an affinity type you have at least 5 in choose a 10 ft area within range that you can see, that area explodes with magic dealing 10 + (Affinity Mod / 2) damage to all creatures in the area who fail a Dex Save, on a success they take half.

Generic.name: Mana Explosion
Generic.description: Choose an affinity type you have at least 10 in choose a 25 ft area within range that you can see, that area explodes with magic dealing 15 + (Affinity Mod / 2) damage to all creatures in the area who fail a Dex Save, on a success they take half.

Generic.name: Mana Decimation
Generic.description: Choose an affinity type you have at least 15 in choose a 25 ft area within range that you can see, that area explodes with magic dealing 30 + Affinity Mod damage to all creatures in the area who fail a Dex Save, on a success they take half.

Cursed.name: Minor Curse
Cursed.description: Target a creature in range. It must make a Wisdom save or gain the Cursed condition. If it is already Cursed, it instead takes 1d4 Cursed damage.

Cursed.name: Hexing Word
Cursed.description: Target a creature in range. It must make a Wisdom save. On a failure, it gains the Hexed condition. If already Hexed it takes 1d6 Cursed damage.

Cursed.name: Aura of Taboo
Cursed.description: Creatures in the area must make a Wisdom save. On a failure they gain 1 stack of the Taboo condition and take 2d8 Cursed Damage.

Cursed.name: Doom
Cursed.description: Make a spell attack against a creature in range. On hit the creature gains 10 stacks of the Taboo condition.

Cursed.name: Final Malediction
Cursed.description: This spell requires concentration. While concentrating all creatures in range which you choose have -4 to all d20 rolls. You may spend any number of BAp to make spell attack rolls against creatures within the radius, on hit they gain 1 stack of the Taboo condition and take 1d4 Cursed damage. When you make BAp spell attacks you may not add your Base Magic Damage to the damage of the attack. Each time you cast one of the BAp spell attacks you must expend 1/4 (rounding down) of the mana cost of the spell.
Cursed.upcast_rule: x2, -1 to d20, +1 taboo stack, +1d6 damage

Tremor.name: Echoquake
Tremor.description: Choose a creature you can see. It must make a Wisdom save. On a failure it takes 3d8 Tremor damage and gains Demoralized. Until the end of your next turn, the next time that creature takes damage from any source it takes an additional 2d8 Tremor damage and is knocked Prone.

Tremor.name: Aftershock
Tremor.description: The ground violently shakes beneath creatures in the area. Each creature must make a Strength save. On a failure it takes 5d8 Tremor damage, becomes Prone, and gains Demoralized. Any creature already suffering Demoralized instead gains Despair for 1 turn.

Tremor.name: Resonance Cascade
Tremor.description: A chain reaction of mental and physical shockwaves tears through the area. Creatures must make both a Strength save and a Wisdom save. If they fail either save they take 8d8 Tremor damage. If they fail both they also gain Despair and cannot cast spells until the end of their next turn. For the next 2 turns, whenever an affected creature takes damage it takes an additional 1d8 Tremor damage.

Tremor.name: Faultline of The Mind
Tremor.description: Tear open a massive imaginary faultline. Creatures in the line must make a Wisdom save. On a failure they take 10d8 Tremor damage, gain Despair, and become Stunned for 1 turn. Any creature already suffering Demoralized, Despair, Frightened, or Psychic Drain instead automatically takes an additional 5d8 Tremor damage. Affected creatures will believe the faultline to be real.

Tremor.name: Worldbreaker Resonance
Tremor.description: A catastrophic resonance spreads through reality itself. Creatures must make a Strength save and a Wisdom save. On a failure of either they take 14d8 Tremor damage, become Prone, gain Despair for 3 turns, and cannot gain advantage on any rolls for the duration. For the next 3 turns, whenever an affected creature takes damage from any source it immediately takes an additional 4d8 Tremor damage.

Deluge.name: Drown Thought
Deluge.description: Choose a creature you can see. It must make a Wisdom save. On a failure it takes 3d8 Deluge damage, gains Soaked, and becomes Demoralized. While Soaked from this spell, the creature has disadvantage on any checks made to maintain Concentration.

Deluge.name: Undertow
Deluge.description: Creatures in the area must make a Strength save. On a failure they take 5d8 Deluge damage, are pulled up to 15 ft toward the center of the spell, gain Soaked, and become Demoralized. Any creature already Soaked instead gains Suffocating until the start of its next turn. While Soaked from this spell, the creature has disadvantage on any checks made to maintain Concentration.

Deluge.name: Abyssal Weight
Deluge.description: Choose a creature you can see. It must make a Constitution save. On a failure it takes 8d8 Deluge damage, gains Suffocating, and immediately loses 20% of its maximum Vitality. If the target already has Psychic Drain, it instead loses 40% of its maximum Vitality. While Soaked from this spell, the creature has disadvantage on any checks made to maintain Concentration.

Deluge.name: Black Tide
Deluge.description: A crushing sea of dark water erupts from nowhere. Creatures in the area must make a Constitution save. On a failure they take 10d8 Deluge damage, gain Soaked and Suffocating, and cannot regain Vitality until the end of their next turn. Creatures already suffering Soaked, Suffocating, Demoralized, Despair, or Psychic Drain take an additional 4d8 Deluge damage. While Soaked from this spell, the creature has disadvantage on any checks made to maintain Concentration.

Deluge.name: Mariana Grave
Deluge.description: The pressure of the deepest ocean descends upon the battlefield. Creatures must make a Constitution save. On a failure they take 15d8 Deluge damage, gain Soaked, Suffocating, and Despair for 3 turns. While affected, any Vitality they lose is lost directly from Health instead. If a creature begins its turn with the Soaked condition from this spell they take 4d8 Deluge damage. While Soaked from this spell, the creature has disadvantage on any checks made to maintain Concentration.

Frostfire.name: Frostburn Lance
Frostfire.description: Make a spell attack. On a hit the target takes 5d8 Frostfire damage and gains 1 stack of the Frostburned condition. If the target already has Burned, On Fire, Frozen, or Frostbitten, it takes an additional 2d8 Frostfire damage.

Frostfire.name: Thermal Rupture
Frostfire.description: Creatures must make a Dexterity save. On a failure they take 8d8 Frostfire damage and gain 2 stacks of the Frostburned condition. If a creature is already suffering a Fire or Ice condition, all damage it takes from conditions is doubled until the start of its next turn. On success damage is halved and no Frostburned is gained.

Frostfire.name: Cryo-Inferno
Frostfire.description: A storm of burning ice engulfs the area. Creatures must make a Dexterity save. On a failure they take 10d8 Frostfire damage, gain 5x Frostburned, on success damage is halved and no Frostburned is gained.

Frostfire.name: Absolute Contradiction
Frostfire.description: Choose a creature you can see. It must make a Constitution save. On a failure it takes 12d8 Frostfire damage and gain x10 Frostburned. For the next 3 turns, every time the creature takes damage which uses Fire or Ice/Cold as its damage type (or as a component of the damage type) they must make a Constitution save or gain an additional 3 stacks of Frostburned per 5 damage taken (minimum of 3).

Frostfire.name: Heat Death
Frostfire.description: Creatures must make a Constitution save. On a failure they take 16d8 Frostfire damage and x20 Frostburned and gain the OnFire Condition and 10 stacks of Frostbitten.

Glacial.name: Flash Freeze
Glacial.description: Make a spell attack against a creature with the Soaked condition. On hit, deal 2d6 + Ice/Cold Affinity Ice/Cold damage and apply 2 stacks of Frozen.

Glacial.name: Glacier Rise
Glacial.description: Concentration. Raise a massive wall of ice up to 30 ft long, 10 ft tall, and 5 ft thick. The wall provides Full Cover and lasts 5 turns. Creatures adjacent to the wall at the start of their turn gain 3 stack of Frostbitten. The wall may be targeted and destroyed and has 50 + Glacial Affinity health hand 10 AC. When it is destroyed it explodes causing all creatures within 10 ft to make a DEX save or take 3d12 Glacial damage. While the wall if up the caster may expend BAp to shoot a shard of ice (spell attack) at creatures within 40 ft of the wall. On hit deal 3d10 Glacial damage and target gains 3 stacks of Frostbitten.

Glacial.name: Whiteout Expanse
Glacial.description: Concentration. A blizzard fills the area during concentration. Creatures inside have Blurred and must make a Constitution save at the start of each turn or gain 6 stacks of Frostbitten and become Soaked. The terrain becomes Difficult Terrain and line of sight through the area is blocked beyond 10 ft. While the blizzard is active the caster may expend BAp to target a creature in the Blizzard with the raining ice, the creature must make a Dex save or take 2d12 + 6 Glacial damage and gains 3 stacks of Frostbitten.

Glacial.name: Moving Glacier
Glacial.description: Create a massive glacier 20 ft long, 5 ft wide, and 10 ft tall in an unoccupied space adjacent to you. Choose a direction. The glacier surges forward up to 60 ft in that direction, stopping early if it collides with a solid wall or if it hits more than 5 creatures and/or objects. As the glacier moves, each creature in its path may expend its Reaction to make a Dexterity save. On a success, the creature may immediately move up to its movement speed to an unoccupied space outside the glacier's path. A creature that cannot move far enough, fails the save, or cannot expend a Reaction is struck by the glacier. A creature struck by the glacier takes 2d12 + 10 Glacial damage and is pushed along with it until the glacier stops moving. If a pushed creature collides with another creature or object during this movement, it takes 1d6 Bludgeoning damage for each collision. If the glacier is stopped by a solid wall, all creatures trapped between the glacier and the wall take 5d10 + 20 Bludgeoning damage. When the glacier stops moving, it shatters in a violent explosion of ice shards. All creatures within 20 ft of the glacier's final location must make a Dexterity save. On a failure, they take 4d12 + 10 Glacial damage. On a success, they take half as much damage. If the glacier would hit more than 5 creatures and/or objects during its movement, it immediately shatters at the point where the 5th creature or object is struck and resolves its explosion there instead of continuing forward.

Glacial.name: Age of Ice
Glacial.description: Concentration. Choose a point within range. A supernatural ice age instantly descends upon the area for concentration. When the spell is cast, all creatures in the area must make a Constitution save. On a failure they take 8d12 + 20 Glacial damage, gain Soaked, gain 8 stacks of Frostbitten, and are knocked Prone. On a success they take half damage and gain half as many Frostbitten stacks. The entire area becomes Difficult Terrain and is considered completely frozen over. At the start of each turn, every creature in the area gains 2 stacks of Frostbitten and takes 2d12 Glacial damage. Any creature that reaches 10 or more Frostbitten stacks immediately becomes Petrified for 1 turn as they are completely encased in ice. Massive glaciers continuously erupt from the frozen landscape. At the end of each of your turns choose up to three points within the affected area. From each point, a glacier 20 ft long, 5 ft wide, and 10 ft tall erupts and surges up to 30 ft in a direction of your choice. These glaciers use all rules from Moving Glacier except they deal half damage. Structures, walls, and terrain within the area become coated in magically reinforced ice, doubling their HP and AC. If a creature begins its turn both Soaked and Frostbitten within the area, it must immediately make a Constitution save or become Petrified for 1 turn. When the spell ends, every glacier and ice formation created by the spell violently shatters. All creatures still within the area (+50 ft) must make a Dexterity save, taking 10d12 + 20 Glacial damage on a failure or half as much on a success. Each time you summon a glacier from this spell effect it costs an additional 20 mana.
Glacial.upcast_rule: x2, +100 ft radius, +2 Glaciers per turn
